title: verbascum × phalereum
intro: Verbascum × phalereum, also known as mullein, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Verbascum × phalereum include its ability to reduce coughs and colds, relieve skin irritations, and even help with ear infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make a medicinal oil that can be used topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
